violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in freezer.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed duct tape on lid of cold hold unit. Duct tape is not a cleanable surface.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. -Observed plates stored that ere not inverted.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Observed single service items stored on floor of dry storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Observed cracks in floor tiles in food prep area.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Backflow prevention, back siphonage (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
